description_long: This is a small fishing or utility boat with a monohull design, featuring a red and white upper hull and a mustard yellow lower hull. The deck includes a small cabin with two square windows and a flat roof, as well as a mast structure at the bow and a ladder or support frame midship. The stern is equipped with an outboard motor, and the boat is supported by a wooden cradle or stand, suggesting it is currently out of the water. The cabin is compact, likely providing minimal shelter and storage for equipment. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal or fiberglass with some wooden elements for the support frame and cradle.
description: A small, red and white monohull boat with a cabin, mast, and outboard motor, resting on a wooden cradle. The design suggests a fishing or utility purpose.
description_view_0: Side view showing the cabin, mast, deck details, and the wooden cradle supporting the boat.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the bow, mast, and the symmetry of the cabin and hull.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the outboard motor, cabin windows, and the support frame on deck.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stern, outboard motor, and the back of the cabin.
